name: v2 cross-tier SSH pivot
description: Successful sshd login on a workstation host (dev-ws-*, office-ws-*) followed within 15 minutes by an sshd authentication event (Accepted or Failed) on a prod-tier host (web-*, db-*, jump-box-*). Cross-tier lateral movement detector; alerts on the staging-then-pivot pattern in playground-v2/attacks/catalog.yaml cross-tier-ssh-probe.
query:
sequence with maxspan=15m
  [any where (host.name like "dev-ws-*" or host.name like "office-ws-*") and process.name == "sshd" and event.outcome == "success"]
  [any where (host.name like "web-*" or host.name like "db-*" or host.name like "jump-box-*") and process.name == "sshd" and event.outcome in ("success", "failure")]
